scripts.api:install: cd backend && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.test:api: curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:18787/api/health | grep -q llm_settings && curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w "GET /api/settings/llm => %{http_code}\n" http://127.0.0.1:18787/api/settings/llm
scripts.api:verify: curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:18787/api/health | grep -q llm_test && npm run api:smoke && echo 'OK: 18787 健康检查与翻译冒烟通过（若失败请先结束旧 uvicorn 再 npm run api）。'
